80.notes: Uses Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool() which returns empty array in test env (no project audio files). cmbIR items will be empty. The oncmbIRControl callback references {PROJECT_FOLDER} but only fires on user interaction, not at init. Compiles fine.

81.notes: Panel paint routine uses Knob1.getValue() closure. Knob1 callback calls Panel1.repaint(). Panel1 is declared after the callback but only used at runtime, not init — should compile fine.

82.notes: Timer-driven shrink animation on panel. Button1 callback starts timer. Compile-only test.

83.notes: Panel grow/shrink toggle animation using Panel1On flag. Similar to 82 but bidirectional. Commented-out toggle lines in timer callback (Panel1On = 0/1) are intentional. Compile-only test.

84.notes: Uses ParametriqEQ1.BandOffset and ParametriqEQ1.Freq attribute constants. CurveEq is the correct module type for 'Parametriq EQ'. Callback-only test, no REPL verification needed.

85.notes: References ScriptFX1.HP and ScriptFX1.LP attribute constants. ScriptFX is a valid module type. Since no script is loaded in the ScriptFX, setAttribute calls may produce errors but should compile at init.

86.notes: Namespace ColourOps with bit-manipulation colour saturation. Panel setPaintRoutine with gradient fill + timer repaint. Self-contained logic — compile-only LAF test.

87.notes: Grid layout inside viewport. Panel has setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback. Panel height is set dynamically from data. Compile-only test.

88.notes: Filter type selector with radio buttons synced to SliderPack. Uses Filter1.getAttribute(3) for filter mode. Large commented-out tabbed interface block is harmless.

89.skipReason: API does not exist: Libraries.load — not part of the HISE scripting API. No 'Libraries' namespace found in the scripting surface. This appears to be a scriptnode DSP network API not exposed to HiseScript.
89.notes: Uses Libraries.load('core').createModule('smoothed_gainer') which is not a valid HiseScript API. Also uses processBlock/prepareToPlay callbacks which are not standard HiseScript callbacks.

90.notes: Master knob scales individual knobs by their stored max values. Simple callback pattern with array indexing via indexOf.

91.notes: STORAGE panel used as value store (holds an array). MASTER knob recalls stored per-knob positions. Filter.Frequency attribute used. Compile-only test.

92.notes: Simple gaussianBlur in a panel layer. Compile-only paint routine test.

93.notes: Knob controls ellipse size in panel paint routine via Knob1.getValue() closure. Panel1 declared after callback but only used at runtime.

94.notes: Knob value used as integer index into delayTimes array (expects 0-6). Default knob range is 0.0-1.0 so delayTimes[0.5] will be undefined at runtime, but compiles fine. Compile-only test.

95.notes: Function-before-definition issue: populatePresetList() is called at namespace init before the inline function is defined. Fix: move the populatePresetList() call to after its function definition. Uses FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.UserPresets) which is valid. Does NOT use FileSystem.browse. File I/O (writeObject) is acceptable in test environment.
95.codefix: Move the `populatePresetList();` call (line 29 of namespace) to after `inline function populatePresetList()` definition (after line 36).

96.notes: Timer-based level meter reading getCurrentLevel() and getDecibelsForGainFactor(). Uses ConvolutionReverb1.DryGain attribute constant. Compile-only test — level values will be 0 in test env.

97.notes: Tracks last touched knob and shows corresponding panel. lastKnobTouched is used as a state-restoring knob (saveInPreset). Panel showControl callbacks. Compile-only test.

98.notes: Panels show/hide on knob interaction with 3-second auto-hide timer. Compile-only test.

99.notes: Panel mouse callback sets tooltip based on left/right zone hover. Compile-only test.

100.notes: Panel with 7 zones, paint routine draws dividers, mouse callback sets zone tooltips. Compile-only test.

101.notes: Complex radial multi-value pad. Uses g.applyMask, g.fillTriangle, g.rotate. Mouse drag controls 5 area sliders. Compile-only LAF/paint test.

102.notes: Zone-based click on panel repositions and toggles viewport visibility. Uses getGlobalPositionX/Y. Compile-only test.

103.notes: Zone-click opens custom popup menu panel. pnlMenu paint routine renders items from popupMenuItems property. Hover highlight logic in mouse callback. Compile-only test.

104.notes: XY pad with draggable crosshair. Stores position in panel value as JSON object. InfoLbl follows mouse. Paint routine uses g.setGradientFill with string colour '0x5500FFFF' (unusual but may work). Compile-only test.

105.notes: Timer reads Dynamics1.CompressorReduction attribute and sets Knob1 value. Knob1 is declared after the timer callback setup but only used at timer runtime, not init. Compile-only test.

106.notes: Bug in mousePos() inline function: uses 'this.getHeight()' and 'this.getWidth()' but 'this' is undefined in a plain inline function (not a panel callback). Fix: replace this.getHeight()/this.getWidth() with pnlMenu.getHeight()/pnlMenu.getWidth() in mousePos(). Grid selector with row/col memorization knobs.
106.codefix: In mousePos() function, replace this.getHeight() with pnlMenu.getHeight() and this.getWidth() with pnlMenu.getWidth().

107.notes: AudioLooper.setSampleRange() called on init with (0, 88200). Knob callbacks update sample range. Compile-only test.

108.notes: Button array toggles Knob1 visibility. Uses ButtonArray[] indexed from 'Button1' and 'Button2'. Compile-only test.

109.notes: Panel timer counts 0-10, updates Label1, then hides panel. btnStart resets and starts. Classic counter example. Compile-only test.

110.notes: Button toggles Panel1 as popup via showAsPopup(false)/closeAsPopup(). Compile-only test.

111.notes: Creates AudioWaveform and Label via addAudioWaveform/addLabel (not getComponent). Sets processorId to 'Audio Loop Player' — requires AudioLooper with that name. No file loading at init. Compile-only test.

112.notes: Draggable EQ handle with Q control. Uses getGlobalPositionX/Y for position tracking. Sets ParametriqEQ1 attribute 2 (Q). Compile-only test.

113.notes: Simple 2-page system: buttons show/hide panels by index. NUM_PAGES=2 so panels are Panel0/Panel1 and buttons btnPage0/btnPage1.

114.notes: Buttons created via Content.addButton (not getComponent). SlotFX switches between EmptyFX and Convolution. The Convolution callback sets {PROJECT_FOLDER}British.aif — only in callback body, not at init. Compile-only test.

115.notes: All UI created via addButton/addKnob. SlotFX switches between SimpleGain and ScriptFX with base64 restoreState(). restoreState() with a valid base64 blob should work in test env. Compile-only test.

116.notes: Global LAF registering drawThumbnailRange and drawThumbnailPath callbacks. No components or modules needed — the LAF functions are registered but never applied to a component here. Compile-only test.

117.notes: RouteFX is a RoutableProcessor so Synth.getRoutingMatrix() can fetch it. Callbacks have guard issue: ComboBox default value is 0, so (value-1)*2 = -2 on first callback. Add guard: if (value < 1) return; in both callbacks.
117.codefix: Add 'if (value < 1) return;' at the start of both onRoutingComboControl and onRoutingCombo2Control.

118.notes: FlexAHDSR LAF with all 5 LAF callbacks. Broadcaster attaches to module parameter 'FLEX' to sync draggable UI to knobs. FlexAHDSRGraph FloatingTile needs to be a FlexEnvelope display. Uses Rectangle() constructor (valid HiseScript). FlexAHDSR added to SineSynth1 gain chain (chain 1).

119.notes: Styled FlexAHDSR with glow effects. Same structure as 118 but with more elaborate LAF including glow layers, gradient fills, and a drawFlexAhdsrText callback. ft_Flex FloatingTile displays the FlexAHDSR. Broadcaster syncs module parameter 'FLEX' to UI knobs. FlexAHDSR added to SineSynth1 gain chain (chain 1).
